title: Whimscape X Chest Tracker
description: An (unofficial) add-on pack that makes Chest Tracker compatible with Whimscape!
body:
Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) and his resource pack [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape), which is the basis for this add-on pack.

# this pack retexture the menu of the [Chest Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker) mod to fit them to [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)!


<details>
